name: Today
detailedForecast: Patchy fog and a slight chance of rain showers before 8am, then a chance of rain showers and patchy fog between 8am and 9am, then rain likely and patchy fog between 9am and 11am, then rain and patchy fog and a slight chance of thunderstorms. Cloudy. High near 57, with temperatures falling to around 48 in the afternoon. West wind 5 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 29 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.
